Title: Rheumatoid Arthritis RCT: Treatment vs Placebo by Sex — Koch & Edwards 1988
Source: Koch, G. G. and Edwards, S. (1988). Clinical efficacy trials with categorical data. In K. E. Peace (ed.), Biopharmaceutical Statistics for Drug Development. R vcd::Arthritis.
note: Treatment (Auranofin) is superior to Placebo in both Male and Pooled strata. Female stratum also shows strong treatment effect (0.778 vs 0.394). No reversal: sex allocation is unequal (more females) but does not flip the treatment advantage. This is a true RCT — the treatment effect is genuine and consistent.
